title: trisetum irazuense
intro: Trisetum irazuense is a species of grass native to Mexico, belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Trisetum irazuense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Trisetum irazuense are typically dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
